meta.project: Good Deeds 4 Your Needs Website Redesign

product_overview: A multi-page marketing and lead-generation website that presents Good Deeds 4 Your Needs’ home care and non-emergency transportation services, builds trust with visitors, and drives inquiries through clear calls to action.
core_goals: Help visitors understand the organization’s primary services (Companion/Sitter Care, Respite, NEMT) quickly
Build trust and convey safety, empathy, and family alignment through content and visual design
Make it easy for visitors to request care or transportation via clear CTAs that lead to the contact/inquiry flow
Allow visitors to explore service overviews and focused transportation content to support informed contact decisions

features.name: Site Navigation
features.description: Persistent header navigation that lets visitors move between main site pages, with a mobile menu and a scroll-triggered glass effect for visual clarity.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Click nav link for About -> See /about
Navigate to / -> Click nav link for Services -> See /services
Navigate to /services -> Click Speak with a Care Expert CTA -> See /contact
Navigate to / -> Scroll down the page -> Observe navbar glass effect appear
Navigate to / on a mobile viewport -> Click hamburger menu icon to open mobile menu -> Click nav link for Contact -> See /contact and mobile menu closes

features.name: Homepage Hero
features.description: Full-width hero communicates value proposition with animated headline and primary CTAs that drive visitors to services or contact.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Click Request an Assessment CTA -> See /contact
Navigate to / -> Click Explore Services CTA -> See /services
Navigate to / -> View floating trust badge -> Observe trust messaging visible near hero

features.name: Service Cards Bento Grid (Homepage)
features.description: Highlighted service cards introduce key services with hover animation and direct entry points to service details or transportation content.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Hover over Companion Care card -> Observe hover animation
Navigate to / -> Click Explore Details on Companion Care -> See /services/companion-care
Navigate to / -> Click Book a Ride on NEMT card -> See /transportation
Navigate to / -> Click Explore Details on Respite Services -> See /services/respite-care

features.name: Services Listing Page
features.description: An overview page listing all main services with benefits tags and View Details actions to explore individual offerings.
user_flows: Navigate to /services -> View all four service cards -> Observe service names and benefit tags
Navigate to /services -> Click View Details on Companion Care -> See /services/companion-care
Navigate to /services -> Click Speak with a Care Expert CTA -> See /contact

features.name: FAQ Accordion with Category Filter
features.description: Categorized FAQ with a sticky category sidebar and animated expandable answers so visitors can find common questions quickly.
user_flows: Navigate to /faq -> Click Care Services category button -> See FAQ list filtered to Care Services
Navigate to /faq -> Click a FAQ question -> Observe accordion expand and answer content visible
Navigate to /faq -> Click multiple FAQ questions -> Observe multiple answers expanded simultaneously

features.name: Contact Inquiry Form
features.description: A lead-generation inquiry form to collect visitor contact details and service interest; currently implemented as a UI-only form without backend submission or validation.
user_flows: Navigate to /contact -> Fill in First Name -> Fill in Last Name -> Fill in Phone Number -> Fill in Email Address -> Select service from dropdown -> Fill in Message / Additional Details -> Click Submit Inquiry button -> Observe form UI acknowledges click (note: form contains no backend submission)

features.name: Footer Navigation
features.description: Footer with brand information, quick links, service links, and contact details to help visitors navigate or reach the organization from any page.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Scroll to footer -> Click logo in footer -> See /
Navigate to / -> Scroll to footer -> Click Quick Links About Us -> See /about
Navigate to /services -> Scroll to footer -> Click Core Services link -> See /services

features.name: Transportation Page (NEMT)
features.description: Dedicated NEMT page that details ride types and safety features with a CTA to request a ride and contact the organization.
user_flows: Navigate to /transportation -> View safety feature cards -> Observe safety messaging and features
Navigate to /transportation -> View journey types grid -> Observe ride type descriptions
Navigate to /transportation -> Click Request a Ride CTA -> See /contact

features.name: About Page
features.description: About page that communicates mission, core values, and vetting standards to build credibility and emotional trust.
user_flows: Navigate to /about -> View mission section -> Observe organization story and mission content
Navigate to /about -> View core values cards -> Observe values labeled Safety, Empathy, Family Alignment
Navigate to /about -> Click Speak with a Coordinator link -> See /contact

routes.description: Homepage with hero, stats strip, service highlights bento grid, process timeline, and CTA section
About page with brand story, core values grid, and vetting standards bento layout
Services listing page with Companion Care, Respite, NEMT, and Errand Assistance cards
Individual service detail page for companion care (dynamic slug route)
Individual service detail page for respite care (dynamic slug route)
Dedicated NEMT transportation page with hero, trust bento grid, and journey types
FAQ page with category sidebar filter (General, Care Services, Transportation) and animated accordion
Contact page with inquiry form (name, phone, email, service dropdown, message) and direct contact info panel

features.name: Site Navigation
features.description: Fixed header navbar with scroll-triggered glass effect, active link indicator, and mobile hamburger menu
user_interactions: Click logo to return to home
Click nav links (Home, About, Services, Transportation, FAQ, Contact)
Click Request Care button on desktop
Click hamburger menu icon on mobile
Click nav links in mobile menu to navigate and close menu
Scroll page to trigger glass navbar effect

features.name: Homepage Hero
features.description: Full-width hero section with animated headline, dual CTA buttons, hero image, and floating trust card
user_interactions: Click Request an Assessment CTA (navigates to /contact)
Click Explore Services CTA (navigates to /services)
View floating trust badge

features.name: Service Cards Bento Grid
features.description: Three service highlight cards (Companion Care, NEMT Transport, Respite Services) with hover effects and links
user_interactions: Hover over service cards to see animation
Click Explore Details on Companion Care (navigates to /services/companion-care)
Click Book a Ride on NEMT card (navigates to /transportation)
Click Explore Details on Respite Services (navigates to /services/respite-care)

features.name: Services Listing Page
features.description: Full services page with four service cards including benefits tags and View Details CTAs
user_interactions: View all four service cards
Click View Details on each service card
Click Speak with a Care Expert CTA (navigates to /contact)

features.name: FAQ Accordion with Category Filter
features.description: Interactive FAQ section with sticky category sidebar and animated accordion expansion
user_interactions: Click category buttons (General, Care Services, Transportation) to filter questions
Click FAQ question to expand/collapse the accordion answer
Multiple questions can be opened simultaneously

features.name: Contact Inquiry Form
features.description: Service inquiry form with fields for name, phone, email, service dropdown, and message textarea
user_interactions: Fill in First Name field
Fill in Last Name field
Fill in Phone Number field
Fill in Email Address field
Select service from dropdown (Companion & Sitter Care, Respite Care, NEMT, Errand Assistance, Not sure yet)
Fill in Message / Additional Details textarea

user_interactions.Click Submit Inquiry button (note: form is UI-only, no backend submission)

features.name: Footer Navigation
features.description: Footer with brand info, quick links, services links, and contact details
user_interactions: Click logo in footer (navigates to /)
Click Quick Links (About Us, Our Services, Transportation, FAQ, Contact)
Click Core Services links (navigate to /services)
Click phone number link
Click email link

features.name: Transportation Page
features.description: NEMT dedicated page with hero, safety bento grid with 4 cards, and journey types grid
user_interactions: Click Request a Ride CTA (navigates to /contact)
View safety feature cards
View journey types grid

features.name: About Page
features.description: About page with brand story, core values (Safety, Empathy, Family Alignment), and vetting standards
user_interactions: View mission section
View core values cards
Click Speak with a Coordinator link (navigates to /contact)

known_limitations.issue: Contact form has no backend - Submit Inquiry button type is "button" not "submit", no form action, no validation implemented
known_limitations.impact: Form cannot actually submit data; no success/error states displayed to user

known_limitations.issue: Form inputs have no associated htmlFor/id linking labels to inputs (accessibility gap)
known_limitations.impact: Screen readers cannot associate labels with form controls

known_limitations.issue: Service detail pages (/services/companion-care, /services/respite-care) exist as dynamic slug routes but may return 404 or empty content if slug data not defined
known_limitations.impact: Clicking "Explore Details" on home and services pages may lead to broken pages

known_limitations.issue: Hero images use direct Unsplash external URLs without Next.js Image component optimization
known_limitations.impact: Images are not optimized; no width/height set; potential layout shift

known_limitations.issue: FAQ page has no metadata export (missing SEO title/description)
Services page is a client component ("use client") but has no client-side interactivity requiring it
known_limitations.impact: Unnecessary client-side bundle increase; page cannot export metadata for SEO

known_limitations.issue: Footer Quick Links URL generation uses string replace which may produce incorrect paths (e.g. "About Us" → "/about-us" not "/about")
known_limitations.impact: Footer navigation links may route to 404 pages

known_limitations.issue: Contact details and address are dummy/placeholder (555 number, generic city)
known_limitations.impact: Client must update before going live
Broken routes show default Next.js 404 page, not branded experience
